title: VIRTUAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS TREATMENT FOR TEENS AND ADULTS - 211info
text: CHARLIE HEALTH VIRTUAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS TREATMENT FOR TEENS AND ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual substance use disorder counseling that includes individual, group, and family therapy. Also provides participants with wrap-around support, including discharge planning, family support groups, and alumni support groups and events for participants. Also, provides specialized information and referrals on substance use disorder resources. Eligibility: Ages 18-64 Hours: Intake: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Treatment: Varies by service Email (986) 206-0414 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (986) 206-0414 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Intake: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Treatment: Varies by service FEES: Accepts Medicaid Coordinated Care Organizations (CCOs): CareOregon (HealthShare and Columbia Pacific), PacificSource Community Solutions Samaritan Health Plans (InterCommunity Health Network), Trillium Community Health Plan (Centene, Oregon), Umpqua Health Alliance, Yamhill Community Care Organization, and most major insurance plans. Limited scholarships and hardship waivers are available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - VIRTUAL ADULT INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT COUNSELING SETTINGS - VIRTUAL TEEN INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - VIRTUAL INTENSIVE TREATMENT FOR EATING DISORDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
